title: Extremely good but ear tips fall off
text: I really like this earphones it's very good for phone calls. I just have one problem with it that the ear tips fall off very quickly and u can loose them very easy and there's no replacement to buy..

title: High Quality Sound For Calls
text: I mostly use buds and neckbands for calls. It has great volume and voice clarity. The callers hear me clearly. Media is outstanding through these. The battery lasts all day
